content: SwayOSD is the de-facto Hyprland OSD: GTK popup for volume/brightness/capslock/numlock. Installed via pacman, driven by swayosd-libinput-backend.service (systemd) or swayosd-client calls bound to XF86Audio*/XF86MonBrightness* keys in hyprland.conf. Styled via ~/.config/swayosd/style.css - can be matugen-templated like other GTK-CSS components.
